Database type assumed to be SQL
Frontend framework assumed to be React
Backend framework/language assumed to be Node.js/Express
Cloud provider/hosting preferences assumed to be AWS
Specific fields for contacts assumed to be name, email, phone, company, address, notes
Specific metrics/information to display on the dashboard assumed to be contact growth, sales performance, user activity
Definition of roles and their specific permissions assumed to be Admin, Standard User, Premium User with respective permissions
Specific features included in the 'premium plan' assumed to be advanced analytics, priority support, increased storage
Payment gateway integration assumed to be Stripe
Pricing model for premium plan assumed to be monthly subscription
Specific analytics data points for admins assumed to be sales performance, user activity, contact growth, premium sign-ups
Styling or UI/UX preferences assumed to be modern and responsive design
Error handling and validation requirements assumed to be standard HTTP error codes and form validation
Scalability or performance requirements assumed to be handling 1000 concurrent users
Testing requirements assumed to be unit testing, integration testing, and UI testing
